contains_no_content_of_requested_type.description: Set to true if the page contains no restaurant or hotel entries (e.g. only maps, legends, index pages, advertisements, editorial text). Set to false if at least one establishment entry is present.

active_city_or_town.description: The last bold all-caps town or city heading visible on this page, including headings that appear above the first entry. Set to the heading text exactly as printed (e.g. 'MÜNCHEN', 'PARIS'). Null only if no town heading appears anywhere on the page (e.g. a pure map page).

entries.description: Array of Michelin Guide establishments extracted from the given page or chunk.

items.description: One establishment as listed on the given page/chunk of a Michelin Guide.

establishment_name.description: Restaurant name exactly as printed (normalized spacing/casing allowed).

location.description: Locality line(s) as printed in the guide header around the entry.

city_or_town.description: City or town name where the establishment is located.

neighbourhood_or_area.description: Neighbourhood or area designation within the city.

contact.description: Contact channels printed in the entry.

map_reference.description: Town-plan or atlas grid references printed near the entry.

plan_grid.description: Grid reference code (e.g., 'A3', 'B2') for locating on map.

awards.description: Quantitative and binary distinctions exactly as printed.

stars.description: Number of MICHELIN Stars (0-3). Set to 0 if the entry is complete and no star glyph (★ or *) appears next to the establishment name. Set to null ONLY when entry_is_fragment is true and the star/award line was not visible on this page.

bib_gourmand.description: Bib Gourmand award indicator. Set to false if the symbol is absent on a complete entry. Set to null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the award section was not visible on this page.

michelin_plate.description: MICHELIN Plate (2016-2021) or Selected Restaurant (2022+). Set to true if the Plate icon or Selected designation appears on a complete entry without stars or Bib Gourmand. Set to false if absent on a complete entry. Null only for fragments.

green_star.description: Green Star for sustainable gastronomy. Set to false if the symbol is absent on a complete entry. Set to null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the award section was not visible on this page.

new_in_guide.description: Indicates if establishment is newly listed in this edition. Set to false if the symbol is absent on a complete entry. Set to null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the award section was not visible on this page.

pleasant_marker.description: Agréable/pleasant/angenehm mark if explicit. Set to false if the symbol is absent on a complete entry. Set to null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the award section was not visible on this page.

comfort_covers.description: Comfort and atmosphere rating (1-5) derived from the count of crossed fork-and-spoon glyphs on the name line, or from an explicit digit. NOT a food quality rating. Set to null only when no fork-and-spoon glyphs are visible at all (e.g., hotel-only entries with no restaurant) or when entry_is_fragment is true and the symbol row was not on this page.

styles.description: Primary cuisine type label as printed (e.g. 'Cuisine traditionnelle', 'Poissons et fruits de mer', 'Italian', 'Modern British'). One or two entries per restaurant.

specialties.description: Signature dishes or specialties mentioned in the guide.

keywords.description: Additional culinary descriptors beyond the primary style label (e.g. 'seasonal', 'regional', 'farm-to-table', 'creative'). Null if no additional keywords are printed.

opening.description: Opening hours and closure patterns as printed.

days_closed.description: Days of the week when establishment is closed.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all prices in this entry (e.g. 'EUR', 'GBP', 'CHF', 'FRF', 'DEM', 'ITL'). Use the three-letter code, not the symbol.

a_la_carte_price_min.description: Minimum price for à la carte dining.

a_la_carte_price_max.description: Maximum price for à la carte dining.

lunch_menu_price.description: Fixed price for lunch menu if specified separately.

set_menus.description: Detailed information about specific set menu offerings.

label.description: Name or description of the menu.

wheelchair_access.description: Wheelchair accessibility available. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

air_conditioning.description: Air conditioning available. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

no_dogs.description: Dogs explicitly not permitted. Set to true if the 'no dogs' pictogram (dog crossed out) appears. False if absent on a complete entry. Null only for fragments.

terrace.description: Terrace seating available. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

garden_or_park.description: Garden or park area on premises. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

outside_dining.description: Outdoor dining available. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

great_view.description: Establishment has a notable or scenic view. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

peaceful.description: Quiet or peaceful setting. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

notable_wine_list.description: Exceptional or extensive wine selection. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

conference_room.description: Conference or meeting room facilities. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

parking.description: Parking available on-site or nearby. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

garage.description: Garage parking available. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

mooring_or_landing.description: Boat mooring or landing facilities. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

open_for_breakfast.description: Breakfast service available. False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

has_rooms.description: Restaurant/inn with letting rooms (symbol or text). False if the pictogram is absent. Null only when entry_is_fragment is true and the amenity row was not on this page.

rooms.description: If 'has_rooms' is true and the guide prints room details.

room_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code for room prices (e.g. 'EUR', 'GBP', 'CHF'). Use the three-letter code, not the symbol. Often identical to pricing.currency.

breakfast_available.description: Breakfast included or available with rooms.

payments.description: Boolean flags mapped from payment symbols/notes.

raw_entry_text.description: Verbatim text span for this establishment (for QA and provenance).

inspector_note.description: Verbatim inspector short note (2-3 lines of prose per entry, introduced 2003). Null for all pre-2003 editions and for entries that carry no prose note.

entry_is_fragment.description: True if this entry is incomplete because it continues from the previous page or continues onto the next page — i.e., the full entry text was not visible on a single page. False for all complete, self-contained entries.
